findings.description: The source strongly recommends that IDE users always set xsi:schemaLocation (「IDEを使用する際は必ず xsi:schemaLocation を適切に設定することを推奨する」). The knowledge file weakens this to a conditional: 「IDEでXSD補完を使用する場合」, implying it is optional. Additionally, the source lists multiple benefits (XSD comment browsing while editing, XML validation, auto-completion), but the knowledge file only mentions XSD補完.
findings.source_evidence: 「この他にもXMLのバリデーションや入力補完等のメリットが得られるため、IDEを使用する際は必ず xsi:schemaLocation を適切に設定することを推奨する。」

findings.description: XmlComponentDefinitionLoader appears in the s2 section body (inside the warning text: 「ConfigFileLoader、XmlComponentDefinitionLoader、SystemRepositoryの初期化処理は…」) but is not listed in the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source warning: 「ConfigFileLoader 、 XmlComponentDefinitionLoader 、 SystemRepository 等の使用形態を明確にするために…」

findings.description: HelloComponent is the PascalCase class retrieved and used in the s10 code example but is absent from the s10 hints array.
HelloComponent is the PascalCase class retrieved in the s13 code example but is absent from the s13 hints array.
